caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and apparel displayed on mannequins, including a yellow garment with the text "LEE" visible. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "PODCAST" beneath a stylized "P" and "STUDIO," while a logo on the right says "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the frames, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and his facial expressions shifting slightly as he delivers his words. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with an unseen presence off-camera.
